action.reasoning: Observation: PyG SchNet approach keeps segfaulting (exit code 139) - likely torch-scatter/sparse compatibility issues with the installed PyTorch. Data loading works but model forward/backward crashes. Analysis: Continuing with PyG is risky without debugging. Switching to SMILES + Morgan fingerprint + MLP approach, which avoids PyG entirely and is very stable. The ceiling is ~0.12-0.14 MAE but a working model beats crashing. Can try 3D approach later if time permits. Decision: Write fingerprint-based train.py and predict.py, train 20 epochs as baseline, submit eval immediately.
